student_answer: Step 1: Nitrate toluene with HNO₃/H₂SO₄ → p-nitrotoluene (para-selective EAS) | Step 2: Oxidize p-nitrotoluene with CrO₃/Ac₂O (forms diacetate intermediate), then hydrolyze with H₂O → p-nitrobenzaldehyde | Step 3: Friedel-Crafts acylation of benzene with CH₃COCl/AlCl₃ → acetophenone | Step 4: Claisen-Schmidt condensation of acetophenone + p-nitrobenzaldehyde with NaOH/EtOH → (E)-1-phenyl-3-(4-nitrophenyl)prop-2-en-1-one (target chalcone)
